inline_comments.message: nope. Instead of removing this just surround it with if .Values.ricLink is not empty and eveyrhting will be working fine and user will be bale to give ricLink via override instead of rebuilding the whole chart

You are right but I think this was done wrongly in OOM in the first place. Actually, we don't have only one RIC, instead we may have multiple RICs and the information about all of them should be put in this json file. See an example configuration here:
https://gerrit.o-ran-sc.org/r/gitweb?p=nonrtric.git;a=blob;f=docker-compose/policy-service/config/application_configuration.controller.json;h=cf97ed98b0a75982936c658c3f33c18da3f7f789;hb=HEAD

So, we need to have multiple ricLinks depending on how many RICs the user has provisioned. I don't think we can use override file to include multiple RICs here.

Ok I was not aware of that but still it's possible to do this with helm, you just need to use a list and a loop here:

in values.yaml:
rics:
 - name: ric1
  link: link1
  anyOtherConfigNeeded: anyValue
 - name: ric2 
  link: link2
  anyOtherConfigNeeded: anyValue

and then here you would just do:

{{ range ric := .Values.rics }}
      {
        "name": {{ $ric.name }},
        "baseUrl": "{{ $ric.link }}",
        "controller": "controller1",
        "managedElementIds": [
          "kista_1",
          "kista_2"
        ]
      }
The change would also need to consider multiple managedElements per RIC.

Removal was intended to fix the issue at hand for Honolulu: 
Invalid URL for "the" RIC. 

RICs can be added at runtime (REST-based config interface, or consul, or configMap change) so removal here could have been considered a temporary fix.

RIC & (SDNC) controller configuration for A1 PMS needs a general re-think and consolidation

TODO in Istanbul

Just for your information that's not a problem at all;)

We would just add another loop and that's it;)
this whitespace after }} prevents linting from passing but I'm not looking at this if I can find an easier way to generate this. Give me a minute

I am not sure if I understand this. Where is a1p.generateRics defined?
I don't see any new template file included in this patchset.

No worries. I also don't understand how I could have been so stupid to forget to add a new file to this patchset;)
